title: TIM - Intel Tracking
content:
Track threat actors and campaigns by uploading threat intelligence in the form of briefs and IOCs. Add notes and find IOCs in related incidents.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Shawn Murphy & Nicholas Ericksen pack (TIMCampaignTracking, community-supported).

Use cases: Threat Intelligence Management.

Integrations/scripts used: IncreaseIncidentSeverity, cve.
